opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My back has completely locked up and I can barely move — I could hardly get to the bathroom tonight without agony. And on top of it I'm just wiped out, this crushing exhaustion. Paracetamol has done nothing. I live on my own and I'm honestly scared I'll fall.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It flared up really badly over the last few hours and I can't get comfortable or move properly, and I didn't want to wait until the morning.

symptom_narrative.onset: the lower back's been niggling on and off for about six months, but it flared up badly tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: six months of coming and going, but really bad for the last 12 hours or so
symptom_narrative.character: stiff and locked up, a deep aching that won't ease
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's ever been — I can't bend or walk properly
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down in my back, across the bottom
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: built up over tonight, and it's been gradually getting worse over the months
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much tonight — maybe lying really still
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to move, get up, or twist
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the tiredness has been really heavy for a while too
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: my back's been playing up on and off for months, but never locked up like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: stuck in bed, can't walk to the bathroom without severe pain, worried about falling because there's no one else home

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: the normal tablets, took some tonight

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried about coping and getting around safely tonight

objective_data_offered.value: lying on my side, moving really slowly and carefully, wincing when I try to shift position

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer
